results.description:
Version constraint ^0.7.4 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching.
It is used by:
	- ^0.7.4 (contracts/ForeignLock.sol#2)
	- ^0.7.4 (contracts/NativeLock.sol#2)
	- ^0.7.4 (contracts/facets/Gov.sol#2)
	- ^0.7.4 (contracts/facets/Manager.sol#2)
	- ^0.7.4 (contracts/facets/Payout.sol#2)

	- ^0.7.4 (contracts/interfaces/IRemove.sol#2)
	- ^0.7.4 (contracts/interfaces/ISherX.sol#2)

Version constraint ^0.7.4 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching.
